prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次为约15445→16836→17273→18830→15246名。2021–2024年呈逐年后移趋势（累计后移约3385名），但2025年大幅回升至15246名，较2024年前移3584名，回到接近2021年水平，波动幅度较大。2025年基准位次约15246名；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划：2021年102人、2022年98人、2023年96人、2024年98人、2025年100人；2026年计划103人，较2025年扩招3人（+3%），小幅扩招对竞争略有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第67名，近年排名稳定在54–67区间，属全国中上游水平；近年声誉评价为中性/混合，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音综合热度排名第68位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量中等，未出现报考关注度异常升温信号；第五轮学科评估中，安全科学与工程获评A+（全国顶尖），测绘科学与技术、土木工程获评A-；安全科学与工程类、测绘类、土木类等招生专业与优势学科直接对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气类、计算机类、人工智能等工科热门专业持续高热，该校相关专业录取位次常年位居前列；辽宁省2026年高考总报名约20万人，按近年物理类占比约71.8%估算，物理类考生约14.36万人，与2025年（14.34万）基本持平，考生规模稳定；省控线2025年物理类本科批367分，较2024年368分略降1分，整体稳定；中国矿业大学位于江苏省徐州市，非本省院校，无本地倾斜；该校在辽宁省招生规模约100人左右，占比较小，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升至接近2021年水平、2026年小幅扩招3%对竞争略有缓解、考生规模基本持平、声誉热度中性等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准15246名基础上，因扩招效应位次数字略增大（竞争略加剧），结合近年波动特征，预测最低位次约15550名，区间15050–16050名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 15445 → 16836 → 17273 → 18830 → 15246. From 2021 to 2024, there was a trend of moving backward year by year (cumulative backward shift of about 3385 places), but in 2025, it rebounded significantly to 15246, moving forward 3584 places compared to 2024, returning to near the 2021 level, with large fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 15246; the university's enrollment plan in Liaoning for Physics Category: 102 in 2021, 98 in 2022, 96 in 2023, 98 in 2024, 100 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 103, an increase of 3 students (+3%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked about 67th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 54–67 range in recent years, at the upper-middle level nationally; recent reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 68th, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms and no abnormal increase in application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Safety Science and Engineering was rated A+ (top in the country), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology and Civil Engineering were rated A-; enrollment majors such as Safety Science and Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, and Civil Engineering directly correspond to advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Electrical, Computer Science, and Artificial Intelligence continue to be highly sought after, with related majors consistently ranking at the top in admission rankings; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Liaoning Gaokao is about 200,000, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 143,600 based on the recent proportion of about 71.8%, basically the same as 2025 (143,400), with a stable candidate pool; the provincial control line for the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch is 367 points, slightly down 1 point from 368 in 2024, overall stable; China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu Province, not a local institution, so there is no local preference; the university's enrollment scale in Liaoning is about 100 students, a relatively small proportion, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound of the 2025 ranking to near the 2021 level, the slight easing of competition due to a 3% enrollment expansion in 2026, the basically stable candidate pool, and neutral reputation heat, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the 2026 Physics Category will slightly increase (competition slightly intensifies) based on the 2025 baseline of 15246, combined with recent fluctuation characteristics, the predicted minimum ranking is about 15550, with a range of 15050–16050.

- Artificial Intelligence (Jiangsu).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 15050–16050, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<15050), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors such as Electrical, Computer Science, and Artificial Intelligence; if your ranking is in the middle of the range (about 15500), prioritize Tier 2 advantageous majors such as Safety Science and Engineering (A+ discipline), Mechanical, and Energy and Power; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>16000), it is recommended to first consider Tier 3 majors and ensure admission.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第67名，近年排名稳定；近年声誉评价为中性/混合，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音综合热度排名第68位，评价为"一般"，报考关注度平稳；该校优势学科（安全科学与工程A+、测绘科学与技术A-、土木工程A-）以工科为主，历史类招生专业（法学、汉语言文学、外国语言文学类）与优势学科关联度较低，学科吸引力对历史类考生有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业社会热度偏热，汉语言文学热度平稳，外国语言文学类热度分化（英语平稳、小语种降温）；辽宁省2026年高考总报名约20万人，按近年历史类占比约28.2%估算，历史类考生约5.64万人，与2025年（5.63万）基本持平；省控线2025年历史类本科批437分，较2024年400分大幅上升37分，反映试卷难度降低或整体竞争加剧；中国矿业大学位于江苏省徐州市，非本省院校，无本地倾斜；该校在辽宁省历史类招生规模仅10余人，占比极小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年缩招16.7%对竞争有明显加剧效应（位次数字减小、更易进）、省控线大幅上升反映整体竞争加剧、考生规模基本持平、历史类位次长期窄幅波动等因素，预计2026年历史类最低位次在2025年基准2875名基础上，因缩招效应位次数字减小（更易进），结合省控线上行带来的竞争压力部分抵消，预测最低位次约2568名，区间2106–3030名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2952 → 2889 → 3003 → 2948 → 2875, fluctuating narrowly within the 2800–3000 range, with a fluctuation range of only about 128 positions over the past 5 years, showing an extremely stable trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2875; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province: 14 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 18 in 2024, and 12 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 10, a reduction of 2 students (-16.7%) compared to 2025, a relatively large reduction that will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 67th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years; recent reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 68th, rated as 'average', with stable application attention; the university's advantageous disciplines (Safety Science and Engineering A+, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-) are mainly engineering, while the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literature) have low correlation with advantageous disciplines, limiting the appeal of these disciplines to History Category students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has high social popularity, Chinese Language and Literature has stable popularity, and Foreign Languages and Literature has differentiated popularity (English stable, small languages cooling down); the total number of candidates for the 2026 Liaoning Province college entrance examination is approximately 200,000, with History Category candidates estimated at about 56,400 based on the recent proportion of about 28.2%, roughly the same as 2025 (56,300); the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 437 points, a significant increase of 37 points from 400 points in 2024, reflecting lower exam difficulty or intensified overall competition; China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou City, Jiangsu Province, not a local institution, so there is no local preference; the university's History Category enrollment scale in Liaoning Province is only about 10 students, a very small proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 16.7% enrollment reduction in 2026, which significantly intensifies competition (ranking number decreases, easier to enter), the significant increase in the provincial control line reflecting intensified overall competition, the basically stable number of candidates, and the long-term narrow fluctuation of History Category rankings, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will decrease from the 2025 baseline of 2875 due to the enrollment reduction effect (ranking number decreases, easier to enter), partially offset by the competitive pressure from the rising provincial control line. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2568, with a range of 2106–3030.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law (Jiangsu)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Jiangsu).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (Jiangsu) (English, German).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 2106–3030, there are only 3 History Category enrollment majors, with clear tiers. Candidates with rankings better than the lower limit of the range (<2106) can focus on sprinting for the Law major; those with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 2568) should target Chinese Language and Literature as the core goal; those with rankings near the upper limit of the range (>3030) are advised to use Foreign Languages and Literature as a safety option.
